# Literal Bear Trap

## Tier 1 Disruption

A crude metal contraption lies hidden on the ground, its jaws slightly ajar. It looks poorly made… almost suspiciously so.

**Purpose:** Introduce an unexpected threat, disrupt the scene, subvert player expectations.

> Difficulty: 14

## Features

### Shot

**Trigger:** When a PC interacts with or steps onto the trap

**Effect:** Instead of snapping shut, the trap springs open with a loud clank. A Bear (Tier 1 Bruiser) suddenly appears within Close range of the trap, immediately aware of the nearest creature. The bear acts immediately after being spawned.

> **Design notes:** I read this joke years ago on Reddit. It's a playful subversion of expectations. What appears to be a simple trap instead introduces a threat to the players.
